name: skymcp
title: SkyMCP — SkyPilot ML Training Ecosystem
description: End-to-end ML training platform for Claude Code. Launch, monitor, fix, iterate, ablate, and serve models on any cloud GPU using SkyPilot with production-grade frameworks (NeMo, Axolotl, torchtune, TRL, DeepSpeed, vLLM).
author: slapglif
